text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I pass by the academy's outdoor stage, I spot
Smart Falcon and Agnes Tachyon engrossed in
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! ☆ I'm so happy! Ask me anything you
wanna know! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... But of course, Falco.
choice_data_list: You two seem like you're having fun.
You two seem like you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Hey, listen to this!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I was just doing a bit of self-promotion—you
know, letting everyone know I'm working hard to
become a top Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And then Tachyon here told me that she wanted
to hear all the deets. ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes... that's an indisputable fact. However, there
is no need to get into the nuts and bolts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I merely wish to analyze her potential for speed.
The latent power that lies dormant in the flesh of
every Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Is there a measurable difference in the effects of
the endorphins she secretes? Are the conduction
velocities of her nerve impulses in some way
unique?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I want to begin my research on Falco!
Immediately!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! But if you want to study me right here
and now... th-that can only mean...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You must be a huge fan! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah—'cause I'm the same way! I study
everything about my fave idols as part of my
research to be a top Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If you want to study me this much, it must mean
that you're really taken by me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That being the case, maybe I ought to give you
an extra special treat.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oho... An extra special treat, you say?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
May I take that as an offer... to cooperate with
my research?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I want to meet the expectations of my
fans and increase my Umadol power even more!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Which meeeans, I'll be with Tachyon for a while,
Trainer!
choice_data_list: Good luck increasing your Umadol power!
Good luck increasing your Umadol power!

What kind of "research" are you going to do
exactly?

What kind of "research" are you going to do
exactly?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Which meeeans, I'll be with Tachyon for a while,
Trainer!
choice_data_list: Good luck increasing your Umadol power!
Good luck increasing your Umadol power!

What kind of "research" are you going to do
exactly?

What kind of "research" are you going to do
exactly?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... Then for our first step, why don't we
head to the infirmary to give you a thorough
health check?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I see them off to the infirmary and go
back to my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter—crash!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Trainer...
choice_data_list:
You're completely out of breath! What
happened?!

You're completely out of breath! What
happened?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Here's the thing... When we got to the infirmary...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Okay, Falco. Hurry up and take a seat, please.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sure! ☆ You mean in this big black chair, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clunk!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wait—what is this?! Why can't I move?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh... It's for my research. You said
you'd give me an extra special treat, did you not?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In accordance with your words, I'm going to use
your body... in a biological experiment!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: E-experiment?! Nope! No way! Absolutely not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rrrrip!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! To think you could remove the restraints by
force!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
AHAHAHA! Fascinating! So this is the power of an
Umamusume—no, an Umadol with her back
against the wall!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...And after that, I got away as fast as I could!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... I guess it's no good trying to raise my
Umadol power by just going along with whatever
the fans want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a difficult story to swallow in many ways, but...
Umadol power aside, it seems that she's grown
stronger in terms of pure strength...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, I wanna know too! Tell us, Tachyon! ☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. There's no need to be in such a hurry.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You'll be painfully aware of the details before long.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! "Painfully aware..."

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Tachyon, what you just said...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It's just like what the killer said in episode nine of Shining ☆ Idol Detective !

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's this super interesting mystery series starring
my fave idol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's this scene where the main character, the
idol detective, talks to the bad guy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And just now, Tachyon sounded just like the bad
guy in that scene. ...You wouldn't happen to be
hiding something, would you, Tachyon?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
AHAHAHA! To think inspiration could take this
form!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, it looks like I've been found out. In that
case, I'm going to apply these restraints right here
and now!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: R-restraints?! Nope! No way! Absolutely not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... AHAHAHA! As expected, my
assumption was correct!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That reaction! That speed! Did quick thinking
draw out your hidden physical potential?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It seems like I can get more useful data if I stick
to observation for the time being!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Smart Falcon has overcome a crisis
(?) with the quick wit born from her daily idol
studies.
